title: Ascent Of Eternity
description:
Ascent of Eternity is the first game being developed by Seventh Eye Studio in Unreal Engine 5.

A primordial trial exists.
Reborn in the punctum of eternity, a path to immortality has been presented to you.
Through the 7 eternal dimensions ancient powers seek to annihilate you. In eternity many challenges exist.

Seven Eternal Dimensions:

Punctum, Epirynth, Tertiamsion, Tesseration, Dodeciahysion, Hexerasion, and Hepternity.

Traverse through randomized dimensional worlds of increasing dimensional complexity to conquer Eternity.

22 Elemental Paths:

The first 7 elemental paths, Fire, Ice, Electric, Light, Dark, Metal, and Life are the starting point of mastery. Each path has a unique set of 7 magical abilities with increasing strength. You must progress through the paths by defeating enemies in combat.

Monsters and Deities:

Swarmed from all sides. stepping into dimensions will summon a horde of opposition. Powerful foes and forces seek to deny your ascent. Defeat or be defeated by endless swarms of enemies. 

The path to immortality is not a simple one. Embrace the allure of magical power to control the elements and dimensions. Massively action packed magical combat chaos awaits you!

⚠️ PHOTOSENSITIVITY WARNING ⚠️
description_short: ASCENT OF ETERNITY™ is an action-rpg rogue-like magical horde-slaying third person coop game. Fire, Ice, Electric, Light, Dark, Metal, and Life. The 7 elements call for mastery. Master the elements and ascend through eternity!
